name: legalant
description: 18-agent AI system for Indian legal work. Contract review, research, translation, redline analysis, negotiation tracking, MCA due diligence, and five practice area workflows.

legalant-pdf-ocr.description: Extract text from PDFs (native text layer via pdfjs-dist; OCR fallback via tesseract.js for scanned documents)

legalant-rbi-scraper.description: Search RBI circulars, master directions, and FEMA notifications; extract PDF content

legalant-sebi-scraper.description: Search SEBI circulars, regulations, enforcement orders, and SCORES data
